# Sreeram Ganesan — sreeramganesan.dev

> Senior Frontend Engineer with 15+ years building high-traffic web applications in Retail and Healthcare.

## About

Sreeram Ganesan is a Senior Frontend Engineer based in Chicago, IL. He has 15+ years of experience delivering digital products at scale across Retail (Grocery, E-Commerce) and Healthcare (Dental, Medical) domains. Currently at CVS Health.

He specializes in React, Next.js, TypeScript, and AI-augmented engineering — including multi-agent AI systems built with CrewAI and Claude.

## Skills

- Frontend: React, Next.js 15, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
- Backend: Node.js, Python, REST APIs, GraphQL
- AI & Agents: CrewAI, Claude (Anthropic), LangChain, OpenAI APIs
- Cloud & DevOps: GCP (certified), AWS, Vercel, Docker, GitHub Actions

## Projects

- sreeram-agent-crew: Multi-agent AI crew for daily precious metals digest and price alerts (CrewAI + Claude + GitHub Actions)
- Splanner: Real-time Planning Poker for agile teams (Next.js 15 + Supabase)
- Interactive Lab: How the Web Works explainer, AI Lab (Resume Matcher, Architecture Advisor), Performance Monitor
